title: GEAS Deliberation Record
description: Current structured deliberation record stored under a legacy file/schema name. Used for task-level or mission-level multi-party judgment and stored in .geas/missions/{mission_id}/decisions/.

task_id.description: Task this deliberation pertains to. Mission-level deliberations may use an implementation-defined surrogate or omit task binding at a higher wrapper layer.

proposal_summary.description: Short summary of the question under deliberation.

participants.description: Agent types participating in the deliberation.

vote.description: Recorded position for this participant. Current enum values are retained for backward compatibility.

severity.description: Required when the participant records a materially negative or blocking position.

result.description: Outcome of the deliberation. 'inconclusive' means quorum was not met.

quorum_failure_count.description: Consecutive quorum failures tracked by the implementation.
